title: Better Game Menu
body:
# BetterGameMenu

Replace the game menu with a better one.   
Integrate the previous "[Game Menu Mod Option](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gamemenumodoption)" and "[Game Menu Remove GFARB](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/game-menu-remove-gfarb)" and add new features!  
It is possible to switch by config for each function.

![Game Menu](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/379/764/2021-07-13_09h27_06.png)


Add the following features
* Add mod options button(Like forge before 1.12.)(ModMenu is required for Fabric)
* Remove "Feed Back" and "Report Bugs" button
* Hide unnecessary "Open to Lan" button
* Add rejoin Button

Changes have been added to the title screen since version 1.1　　
![Title Menu](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/382/560/2021-07-24_17.png)
 

1.1~Onry
* Added shortcut button for last joined world or server (Like [JoinLastWorld](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/joinlastworld))
